title: Laps
description: Bronze-layer fact table. One row per driver per lap. ~20–30k rows per race (20 drivers × 50–70 laps). Hive-partitioned by season and race.
x-notes: LapTime is nanoseconds in Parquet; convert to seconds with / 1e9. Qualifying laps share this schema with session='Q'.

LapNumber.description: 1-indexed lap number within the session. Includes outlap (lap 0) if present.

LapTime.description: Lap duration in nanoseconds. Null for in-progress or invalid laps. Convert to seconds in dbt: `LapTime / 1000000000.0`.

TyreLife.description: Consecutive laps on current tyre set. Resets to 1 on pit stop.

FreshTyre.description: True if tyre age ≤ 1 lap. FastF1 infers from pit stop data.

PitOutLap.description: True if driver exited the pit lane on this lap.

PitInLap.description: True if driver pitted at the end of this lap.

PitInTime.description: Session elapsed time at pit lane entry in nanoseconds. Null if no pit-in this lap.

PitOutTime.description: Session elapsed time at pit lane exit in nanoseconds. Null if no pit-out this lap.

Team.description: Constructor/team name as returned by FastF1.

Stint.description: Stint number within the race session, 1-indexed. Resets to 1 after a pit stop.

Sector1Time.description: Sector 1 duration in nanoseconds. Convert to seconds with / 1e9.

Sector2Time.description: Sector 2 duration in nanoseconds. Convert to seconds with / 1e9.

Sector3Time.description: Sector 3 duration in nanoseconds. Convert to seconds with / 1e9.

Sector1SessionTime.description: Session elapsed time at Sector 1 exit in nanoseconds. Used for air-gap joins.

Sector2SessionTime.description: Session elapsed time at Sector 2 exit in nanoseconds.

Sector3SessionTime.description: Session elapsed time at Sector 3 exit in nanoseconds.

SpeedI1.description: Speed at intermediate trap 1 in kph.

SpeedI2.description: Speed at intermediate trap 2 in kph.

SpeedFL.description: Speed at finish line trap in kph.

SpeedST.description: Speed at main straight speed trap in kph.

IsPersonalBest.description: True if this lap is the driver's personal best for the session.

Deleted.description: True if the lap time was deleted (e.g. track limits violation).

Position.description: Race position at end of lap.

FastF1Generated.description: True if this lap row was synthesised by FastF1 rather than sourced from telemetry.

LapStartTime.description: Session elapsed time at lap start in nanoseconds.

IsAccurate.description: True if telemetry coverage is complete for the lap. FastF1 internal flag.

race_id.description: Format: `YYYY_RoundNumber`. Links to telemetry and race_control.

season.description: Hive partition key. Prune all queries with this column.
